heading: Policy coordination concerning implementation of on-site inspection provisions
label: 2595a Policy coordination concerning implementation of on-site inspection provisions

children.heading: Interagency coordination
children.label: a Interagency coordination
children.text: OSIA should receive policy guidance which is formulated through an interagency mechanism established by the President.

children.heading: Role of Secretary of Defense
children.label: b Role of Secretary of Defense
children.text: The Secretary of Defense should provide to OSIA appropriate policy guidance formulated through the interagency mechanism described in subsection (a) and operational direction, consistent with .section 113(b) of title 10

children.heading: Role of Secretary of State
children.label: c Role of Secretary of State
children.text: The Secretary of State should provide to the interagency mechanism described in subsection (a) appropriate recommendations for policy guidance to OSIA consistent with sections 2551(3) and 2574(b) of this title.
